title: Head of Catering / Director of Operations
description:
Job Title:

Head of Catering / Director of Operations

Job Purpose:

To lead, manage, and grow The Curry Club’s catering and operational functions by ensuring consistent food quality, service excellence, operational efficiency, and profitable delivery across all catering events and production operations.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Catering Operations & Delivery

  • Oversee end-to-end catering operations, including production, logistics, setup, service, and teardown.

  • Ensure all catering events are executed according to company standards, client requirements, and food safety regulations.

  • Monitor event readiness, staffing deployment, and on-site service quality.

2. Operational Management

  • Develop and implement standard operating procedures (SOPs) for catering production and service.

  • Optimise workflows to improve efficiency, reduce wastage, and control operational costs.

  • Ensure compliance with food hygiene, safety, and workplace regulations.

3. Team Leadership & Workforce Development

  • Lead, coach, and develop catering supervisors, kitchen teams, and service staff.

  • Identify training needs and work with trainers to implement workplace learning and coaching plans.

  • Conduct regular performance reviews and provide structured feedback to team members.

4. Quality & Customer Experience

  • Maintain high standards of food quality, presentation, and customer service across all catering engagements.

  • Handle escalated customer feedback, complaints, and service recovery professionally.

  • Continuously improve customer experience based on feedback and performance reviews.

5. Planning & Coordination

  • Coordinate closely with sales, kitchen, logistics, and suppliers to ensure smooth execution of events.

  • Forecast manpower, equipment, and ingredient requirements for upcoming catering bookings.

  • Ensure timely communication between all internal stakeholders.

6. Business Performance & Reporting

  • Track operational KPIs such as event execution quality, customer satisfaction, manpower productivity, and cost control.

  • Prepare operational reports and recommendations for management review.

  • Support business growth by improving operational scalability and readiness.

Key Competencies & Skills:

  • Strong leadership and people management skills

  • In-depth understanding of catering and F&B operations

  • Excellent planning, coordination, and problem-solving abilities

  • Strong customer service and service recovery skills

  • Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple events

  • Good communication and stakeholder management skills

Qualifications & Experience:

  • Diploma or Degree in Hospitality, Culinary Arts, Business, or related field

  • Minimum 5–8 years of experience in F&B or catering operations

  • At least 3 years in a senior supervisory or management role

  • Experience managing large-scale catering operations preferred

Authority & Decision-Making:

  • Authority to deploy manpower and operational resources for catering events

  • Authority to implement operational improvements and SOPs

  • Escalation of major financial or strategic decisions to Managing Director

Success Indicators (KPIs):

  • Consistent delivery of catering events without service failures

  • High customer satisfaction and repeat catering clients

  • Improved staff performance and reduced operational errors

  • Effective cost control and operational efficiency
